overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious waterfront rooftop terrace in a futuristic urban setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through modern outdoor lounge areas, passes a cafe, encounters an armed guard, and descends stairs while enjoying panoramic city and water views.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop terrace lounge with fire pit seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden deck of a rooftop terrace, passing modern outdoor sofas and a central fire pit table with waterfront views

entered.detail: modern white cushioned outdoor sofa set with wooden frame
low square table with glass fire pit in the center
transparent glass safety railing along the terrace edge
distant view of water and futuristic city buildings across the bay
tall curved modern street lamp with orange accent

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny rooftop terrace with modern outdoor furniture arranged around a central fire pit. The camera moves forward along the wooden deck, revealing panoramic waterfront views through glass railings, with distant futuristic architecture visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: Port Cafe exterior with outdoor seating and stairs

events.description: moving from open terrace to covered walkway along the building facade with Port Cafe signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the Port Cafe signage and rows of white patio umbrellas, approaching an exterior staircase

entered.detail: large illuminated signage reading PORT CAFE on dark building facade
large white outdoor umbrellas shading cafe tables
wooden staircase with metal railings leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the building facade, revealing the Port Cafe with its outdoor seating area shaded by white umbrellas. The space transitions from fully open to partially covered as the camera approaches a staircase, with the waterfront view shifting to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor lounge with striped awnings and red accent lighting

events.description: encountering an armed guard in tactical gear standing near the lounge seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded lounge area with striped canvas canopies, passing potted plants and modern seating with red neon accents, approaching an armed guard

notable_agents.action: armed guard in tactical gear and helmet standing stationary near the lounge seating

entered.detail: overhead canopy with black and white stripes providing shade
modern outdoor sofas with red neon accent lighting along the base
dark wooden bar structure with glass top and bottles

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a stylish covered lounge area featuring striped canvas awnings and modern seating with red neon accents. Potted palm plants and an outdoor bar create a resort atmosphere. An armed guard in tactical gear stands prominently in the walkway as the camera approaches and passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront deck with descending stairs and cargo area

events.description: beginning descent down wooden stairs with glass railings to lower terrace level

agents.ego_description: moving past the lounge area toward the open deck, then descending wooden stairs with glass sides, passing stacked cargo crates on the lower level

entered.detail: wooden pergola structure with canvas roofing
transparent glass panels along the staircase edge
piles of wooden cargo boxes and containers on lower level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered lounge, the camera returns to the open waterfront deck with unobstructed views of the water and distant city. The camera approaches and descends a wooden staircase with glass railings, revealing a lower terrace area with stacked cargo crates and continued waterfront views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a sun-drenched rooftop terrace that transitions from an open lounge area into a shaded cafe space. It begins by gliding along a wooden deck past modern outdoor furniture and a central fire pit, with glass railings offering an expansive view of futuristic architecture across the water. As the camera moves forward, the panoramic waterfront vista shifts to the left while the path follows the building's facade. The scene then opens into the Port Cafe area, where the bright sunlight gives way to the shade of white umbrellas over outdoor seating. Finally, the environment shifts from the open deck to a partially covered space as the camera approaches a descending staircase.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit luxury lounge out onto an expansive open-air waterfront terrace. It begins by gliding through a stylish covered area characterized by striped canvas awnings, potted palms, and modern seating with red neon accents. As the camera moves forward, it passes an armed guard in tactical gear standing prominently in the walkway before exiting the lounge. The scene then opens up to an unobstructed view of the water and distant city skyline as the camera approaches a wooden staircase with glass railings. Finally, the perspective descends the stairs to reveal a lower terrace area filled with stacked cargo crates while maintaining the panoramic waterfront vista.
